## 接口定义

### {端点名称}

```
Method:  GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
Path:    /api/v1/...
Auth:    required / optional / public

Request:
  - param1: type, required, desc

Response (200):
  { "field": "type" }

Error Responses:
  - 400: {描述}
  - 404: {描述}
```
